word: G4261 - προβάλλω - probállō - prob-al'-lo - Put forward

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προβάλλω

- Transliteration: Proballo

- Phonetic: prob-al'-lo

- Definition:

1. to throw forward

a. of trees, to shoot forth, put out leaves

b. to germinate

c. to push forward, thrust forward, put forward

- Origin: from G4253 and G906

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G906; to throw forward that is push to the front germinate: - put forward shoot forth.
